## How to test
- [ ] Run `npm run dev` and open the affected section
- [ ] Check the golden path works
- [ ] Check edge cases (empty state, retry, new exam set)

## Checklist
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes locally
- [ ] `npx eslint . --max-warnings 0` passes locally
- [ ] No hardcoded answers or copy-paste shortcuts left in exam exercises
- [ ] Audio files re-generated if listening scripts changed
